name: inject
description: Inject raw shellcode or TeamServer-generated shellcode into a process.

beacon_hash.description: Full beacon hash identifying the session that should execute the command.

listener_hash.description: Full listener hash for the target beacon session.

payload_type.description: Payload source flag: --raw for shellcode, --donut-exe for an executable, or --donut-dll for a DLL.

input_file.description: Raw shellcode, .NET executable, or .NET DLL path. The module also searches release Tools and Windows beacons directories.

pid.description: Target process id. Use a negative value to spawn the configured process before injection.

method.description: DLL method name. Required only when payload_type is --donut-dll.

arguments.description: Optional arguments passed to the .NET executable or DLL method.
